proposal_text:
Title: Harvest of Whispers
Concept: Where your sanity is the only crop.
Website Product Description: Prepare to descend into 'Harvest of Whispers,' a chilling psychological horror game where your own mind becomes the ultimate battlefield. You awaken in a decaying, surreal world, not quite abandoned, but imbued with a malevolent presence that seems to watch and judge your every move. This is a journey into profound, creeping dread, far beyond simple jump scares, designed to slowly unravel your very perception of reality. As you explore sinister environments and uncover unsettling whispered secrets, you will experience a chilling erosion of your identity and reason. The world itself will distort your perceptions, making you constantly question what is real and what is a figment of your fraying sanity. Every shadow, every sound, every strange occurrence pushes you closer to a terrifying realization: the true horror isn't just lurking outside, but growing insidiously within you. This game delves deep into the unsettling notion that your mental state is the ultimate prize in a sinister game. Can you resist the pervasive influence, or will your mind be the next crop to be harvested by the malevolent forces that seek to claim it?

Title: Super-Powered. Super-Stressed.
Concept: Save the world. Then, save yourself.
Website Product Description: Step into the cape of an extraordinary hero, not just for the thrill of saving the planet, but for the relentless chaos of juggling it all. In 'Super-Powered. Super-Stressed.', you'll harness incredible abilities to face down cosmic threats, but you'll also navigate the taxing realities of super-powered life. Manage your relationships, your finances, and your sanity under the constant glare of public expectation and the crushing weight of your own potential. Can you truly be a hero when your biggest battles are waged within? Embrace the ultimate test of resilience, where every victory on the battlefield comes with a cost back home.
